name: "phistar mass 76-106" of "Measurement of the mass dependence of the transverse momentum of lepton pairs in Drell-Yan production in proton-proton collisions at $\sqrt{s}$ = 13 TeV"
description: The measured differential cross section in the $76 \le M_{ll} < 106$ GeV mass window, in bins of the $\varphi^*$ variable. The values are normalized by the bin width.
keywords: P P --> GAMMA* --> LEPTON+ LEPTON-, P P --> GAMMA* --> E+ E-, P P --> GAMMA* --> MU+ MU-, P P --> Z --> LEPTON+ LEPTON-, P P --> Z --> E+ E-, P P --> Z --> MU+ MU-, 13000, Cross Section, Single Differential Cross Section, Drell Yan, Z Production, Di-Muon Production, Transverse Momentum Dependence, DSIG/DPHISTAR
